title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast from New York Tech Week discusses how software engineering roles are changing with AI, the trend of tokenmaxxing as companies deplete AI budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large models on personal devices, and universities' need for mandatory AI literacy courses as graduates enter workplaces transformed by AI.
